metadata.description: Android emulator automation skills for Claude Code (cross-platform parallel to conorluddy/ios-simulator-skill)

plugins.name: android-emulator-skill
plugins.description: Phase 1 production scripts for Android app testing and automation. Cross-platform (macOS, Linux, Windows) — the Android equivalent of ios-simulator-skill.

plugins.name: dispatch-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that validates Agent/Task dispatch calls: enforces model presence, rejects invalid model names (haiku|sonnet|opus|fable only), blocks opus-floor agents dispatched below floor, and hard-blocks sentinel+fable. Fail-open — never bricks a session.
